summary: Dashboard displays core functionality with authenticated navigation and billing widgets. Minor branding inconsistencies with manifesto requirements for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses neutral cream/beige background colors instead of the required diner palette surfaces (teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea). The current background appears to be a generic neutral that doesn't match the brand palette.
Card surfaces appear to use generic cream/beige tones rather than the specified cream surface color #fff8ea for cards and headers.

actions: Apply diner palette backgrounds to authenticated dashboard surfaces per M.universal.1
Update card surfaces to use specified cream color #fff8ea per M.palette.3
Ensure visual consistency between public and authenticated surfaces per brand requirements
